emotional_tone: Warm, inviting, cozy, family-friendly, and appetizing.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing: py-24 or py-32 for sections, gap-8 to gap-12 for grids. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8).
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID for the photo gallery and menu highlights. Mix span ratios (col-span-full, col-span-4, col-span-2) to create asymmetry and negative space.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content; center-align hero text if visually balanced.

component_instructions.structural: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for sections, overlapping elements, and asymmetrical grids. Avoid standard Shadcn Cards for creative sections.
component_instructions.interactive: Use Shadcn components for the Reservation Form (Form, Input, Select, Calendar, Popover, Button). Heavily customize them to match the earthy theme (e.g., remove default Vercel-look, use Terracotta focus rings, rounded-sm). Implement for .js files.
component_instructions.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80, with a delicate 1px bottom border (border-[#E6E1D8]/50).
component_instructions.hero_overlay: If text is over the hero image, use a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2A3B2C]/80 via-[#2A3B2C]/40 to-transparent) rather than a flat blanket overlay.
component_instructions.buttons: Terracotta (#C85A32) for primary CTA. Hover state must explicitly lighten the hue (e.g., hover:bg-[#D96B43] hover:text-white). Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.

animations.scrolling: Implement 'lenis' for smooth scrolling to give a premium feel.
animations.elements: Framer Motion for entrance animations (staggered fade-up for menu items). Hover states on cards should have a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow.

icons: lucide-react for standard UI icons (MapPin, Phone, Clock, Utensils).

specific_sections.reservation_form: Integrate Shadcn Form with Calendar/DatePicker. Ensure inputs have generous padding (p-6) and clear labels. Save to DB logic will be wired to backend.
specific_sections.services_strip: Use the 'Marquee Strategy - Editorial Ribbon'. Low contrast background (Pale Linen #F2EFE9) with Dark Forest Green text, massive gaps (gap-24), slow smooth drift using react-fast-marquee.
specific_sections.footer: Massive spacing (py-24). Dark theme contrast (bg-[#2A3B2C] text-[#FAF9F6]). Large typography for the 'Visit Us' CTA.
